message:
fix(vfs,parser,datetime): remove redundant .into() casts, simplify pattern matching, fix datetime overflow

crates/fsqlite-vfs/src/unix.rs:
- Remove unnecessary .into() on libc::F_UNLCK, libc::F_RDLCK, and
  libc::F_WRLCK arguments to posix_lock/posix_unlock across 10 call
  sites — these constants already have the correct type (i32)
- In check_reserved_lock: replace i32::from(flock.l_type) and
  i32::from(libc::F_UNLCK) with direct i16 comparison using
  i16::try_from(libc::F_UNLCK).expect() for type-safe lock checking

crates/fsqlite-parser/src/semantic.rs:
- Simplify two identical blocks in Resolver::resolve_expr that handle
  window frame end bounds: replace nested `if let Some(end) = ...`
  + inner `match` with a single `if let Some(FrameBound::Preceding(expr)
  | FrameBound::Following(expr)) = &frame.end` pattern, removing 4
  lines of nesting in each occurrence (lines ~578 and ~809)

crates/fsqlite-func/src/datetime.rs:
- Fix month/year modifier overflow: change apply_month_year_exact from
  fallthrough to approximate path (which panics on overflow in
  jdn_to_ymd) to early return via `?` operator when the exact
  arithmetic returns None, propagating NULL for out-of-range dates

artifacts/bd-688.3/:
- Add new bead run bd-688.3-20260226T063156Z.json
- Update report-latest.json: bump timestamps to 20260226T063156Z,
  fix harness_integration_tests command to use -p fsqlite-harness
  flag for correct package targeting

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Updated issue tracking state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    }

+}
